event_templates.narrative: The forest comes alive with the sounds of combat as {initiator_name} from District {initiator_district} launches a surprise attack on {target_name} from District {target_district}. Weapons clash and the struggle for survival intensifies.

Honor and survival collide as {initiator_name} from District {initiator_district} formally challenges {target_name} from District {target_district} to single combat. The arena watches as the two tributes face off.
{initiator_name} from District {initiator_district} fiercely defends their claimed territory from {target_name} from District {target_district}. The battle for resources and safety rages on.

Trust shatters in the arena as {initiator_name} from District {initiator_district} turns on their former ally {target_name} from District {target_district}. The betrayal sends shockwaves through the remaining tributes.

Desperation drives {initiator_name} from District {initiator_district} to attempt stealing a weapon from {target_name} from District {target_district}. The confrontation could mean life or death for both tributes.

event_templates.description: A skirmish breaks out among {participant_count} tributes!
event_templates.narrative: Chaos erupts as {participant_names} find themselves in close quarters. Weapons are drawn and the skirmish begins, with each tribute fighting for survival in the crowded confrontation.
In the face of greater threats, {participant_names} decide to band together. Their alliance may be temporary, but for now they present a united front against the arena's dangers.

event_templates.description: Betrayal strikes within the group of {participant_count} tributes!
event_templates.narrative: What began as a tense standoff turns deadly when one tribute turns on the others. {participant_names} are caught off guard as the betrayal unfolds in their midst.

event_templates.description: {participant_count} tributes fight over a valuable resource!
event_templates.narrative: A valuable resource draws {participant_names} into conflict. What starts as competition quickly escalates into a brutal fight for possession of the prize.

event_templates.description: A tribute ambushes a group of {participant_count} others!
event_templates.narrative: Using the element of surprise, one tribute launches a daring ambush against {participant_names}. The group scrambles to defend themselves against the unexpected attack.
Alliances shatter and old rivalries flare as {participant_names} engage in mutual combat. The group battle creates chaos and opportunity for all involved.

metadata.description: Player vs Player combat events and random multi-tribute encounters
